allow: PowerShell(flutter pub add flutter_local_notifications timezone flutter_timezone)

PowerShell($adb = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe","C:\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\); Write-Output "adb=$\($adb.FullName\)"; if \($adb\) { & $adb.FullName devices })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP logcat -c; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am force-stop kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am start -n kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak/.MainActivity; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP logcat -d -s flutter 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys window displays | grep -E 'mAwake|mScreenOn|mDream'"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys activity activities | grep -E 'mResumedActivity|mFocusedApp'")

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "input keyevent KEYCODE_WAKEUP; input swipe 720 2000 720 500"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys window displays | grep -E 'mAwake|mScreenOn|mDream'"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys activity activities | grep -E 'mResumedActivity'")

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "settings put global stay_on_while_plugged_in 7"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "input keyevent KEYCODE_WAKEUP"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "input swipe 720 2500 720 500"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP logcat -c; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am force-stop kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am start -n kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak/.MainActivity; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys activity activities | grep mResumedActivity"; "----"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP logcat -d 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "flutter :|FlutterError|Unhandled" | Select-Object -Last 100)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "dumpsys activity activities" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "alyak|Resumed|topActivity|focusedApp" | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "wm dismiss-keyguard"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am force-stop kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell am start -n kr.co.sphinfo.alyak.alyak/.MainActivity; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; & $adb -s R3CX10DT1XP shell "uiautomator dump /sdcard/ui.xml; cat /sdcard/ui.xml" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "alyak|text=" | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(cd C:\\alyak; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd C:\\alyak; flutter run -d R3CX10DT1XP --no-hot 2>&1 } ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 90; Stop-Job $job; Receive-Job $job | Out-String | Select-Object -Last 8000 ; Remove-Job $job -Force)
